items.title: [正面] I first installed this game in March, and dropped ...
items.summary:
I first installed this game in March, and dropped it immediately after finishing the tutorial due to the GPT translations. Now, though, I am back, and...

Guess what? They have fixed the translations now, and a lot already feels much better than it was, not to mention the devs' stated and announced intention to focus now on the polishing of the already-existing content as opposed to pushing tons of new content out without proper QA.

Which means, translation fixes are all-encompassing, not to mention the fact that the devs actually added a voiceover to the prologue and the epilogue of the first arc now, and made it actually fully readable. I am very optimistic about this game, and you should be, too.

As to the gameplay, everyone else in the review section already gave all the info you could need: a Lovecraft-themed card battler with roguelite elements and a somewhat forgiving gacha and generous gibs from the devs, not to mention a fair monetisation. And the story? It's peak. Enough said.

Go give it a try, and enjoy your stay like I am right now!

items.title: [正面] This is the best gacha game I have ever played, ev...
items.summary:
This is the best gacha game I have ever played, even better than limbus company (I'm part of the 0,0000001% of people who aren't really hooked by lc) or pgr. 10/10 hidden gem, will be playing daily.
[Some months later] I really got into limbus and I can say it's better than morimens ahahaha
Still, morimens is my second best <3
